## Problem

What are you trying to do that tv makes hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. Keystrokes, config, or UI behavior as concrete as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, references, or related issues.
